response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across various domains, including embedded systems, but lacks direct experience with embedded networking firmware, Linux kernel modifications, or security technologies like MACsec or IEEE 802.1X. While their C/C++ experience is noted, it is not explicitly tied to embedded environments. Their Japanese proficiency is also unconfirmed.
strengths: Strong C/C++ proficiency with experience in low-level and embedded-like systems (e.g., DLang, Node.js for hardware control)
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies and domains
Diverse experience in software development, including system-level programming and automation
concerns: No direct experience with embedded networking firmware or LAN-switch products
No evidence of Linux kernel source-code modification or security-focused development
Japanese language proficiency and native-level requirement are unconfirmed
